summary: EXP-544 written. Two patches proposed: P2 (preferred) adds new h3 'Internal formula heterogeneity' to §6.14 between 'How κ was derived' and 'What κ predicts during past eclipses' (~430 words documenting BOU/W004/monitor.py-KAPPA-twice/inject_ai_layer-PRED-001 heterogeneity); P3 (fallback) inserts ~75 words inline into §8b.3 L3a paragraph. Apply P2; close ISS-2384 after integration; route post-integration §6.14 to curmudgeon as review_class='verification'.
